cue.name: SystemInitV3
cue.comment: Renamed: old non-instantiate SystemInit stuck as complete in saves

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Trading AI system initializing... (SystemInitV3)'

set_value.name: global.$GT_Scheduler
set_value.exact: table[ $WorkQueue = [], $ActiveWork = table[], $Budgets = table[ $CheapOpsPerTick = 10, $OfferOpsPerTick = 5, $MatchOpsPerTick = 1, $MaxActiveHomeSearches = 1 ], $Counters = table[ $Queued = 0, $Active = 0, $Completed = 0, $Failed = 0 ], $Processing = false, $LastStatsLog = player.age ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-WARN] SystemInit: ActiveWork is a list (no .keys property), reinitializing as table[]'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Trading AI system initialized (Modular Architecture)'
'[GT-WakeUp] ONE-TIME: Waking ships stuck in old wait states from previous save'

signal_objects.comment: Wake up ships stuck in old code

debug_text.text: '[GT-MD] Ignoring GT_Legacy_Trade_Request without valid ship payload'
'[GT-MD] RECEIVED GT_Trade_Failed from AI: ' + $ship.idcode + ' (Reason: ' + $failureData.$Reason + ', ReasonType: ' + $reasonType + ', PathBlocked: ' + $pathBlocked + ')'

'[GT-MD] Added failed sector pair to blacklist for sector ' + (if $currentSectorName? then $currentSectorName else 'Unknown') + ': ' + (if $buySectorName? then $buySectorName else 'Unknown') + ' → ' + (if $sellSectorName? then $sellSectorName else 'Unknown') + ' (Ship: ' + $ship.idcode + ', will be filtered for all ships in this sector)'
'[GT-MD] WARNING: Could not store failed trade for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - sector data incomplete'

delay.comment: Allow AI to enter wait state before processing

debug_text.text: '[GT-MD] ProcessDelayedTradeRequest redirected to GT_Search_Request for ' + $ship.idcode
'[GT-MD] Processing trade request for ' + $ship.idcode + ' at game time ' + player.age
'[GT-MD] ERROR: Legacy trade request signal missing required MaxBuy/MaxSell parameters for ship ' + $ship.idcode + ' (MaxBuy: ' + $maxBuy + ', MaxSell: ' + $maxSell + ')'

set_value.name: $parametersTable
set_value.exact: table[ $HomeBase = @$requestData.$HomeBase, $MaxBuy = $maxBuy, $MaxSell = $maxSell, $CargoTarget = @$requestData.$CargoTarget, $WareBasket = @$requestData.$WareBasket, $AllowIllegal = @$requestData.$AllowIllegal, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = if $requestData.$EnforceRouteIllegalLegality? then @$requestData.$EnforceRouteIllegalLegality else false, $FactionPriority = @$requestData.$FactionPriority, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @$requestData.$IgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @$requestData.$IgnoreBuildStorage, $IgnoreTradeRules = @$requestData.$IgnoreTradeRules, $IgnorePlayerPricing = if $requestData.$IgnorePlayerPricing? then @$requestData.$IgnorePlayerPricing else false, $IgnoreMK1Supply = @$requestData.$IgnoreMK1Supply, $DistancePenalty = @$requestData.$DistancePenalty, $FleetCoordination = @$requestData.$FleetCoordination, $RequestTime = player.age, $ForceLiveSearch = $forceLiveSearch ]

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') AI trade request received for ' + $ship.knownname + ' (MaxBuy: ' + @$requestData.$MaxBuy + ', MaxSell: ' + @$requestData.$MaxSell + ', TraceId: ' + $traceId + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Ship busy: has ' + $ship.tradeorders.count + ' trade orders - NOT queueing'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Ship busy: in training - NOT queueing'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Requesting search directly via GT_Search_Request'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') NOT QUEUED: Ship is busy'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Trade search already in progress, ignoring duplicate request'
'[GT-MD] (' + $ship.idcode + ') STALE lock detected: SearchLock exists but AIParameters.$RequestTime is missing - clearing transient state to recover'

do_if.value: not $hasOngoingWork and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheQueued? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$CacheQueued.{$ship}?
not $hasOngoingWork and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveQueued? and global.$GT_SearchSemaphore.$LiveQueued.{$ship}?

not $hasOngoingWork and global.$GT_AIParameters? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}.$WaitReason? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}.$WaitReason == 'home_refresh_wait'

debug_text.text: '[GT-MD] (' + $ship.idcode + ') STALE in-progress trade search detected on duplicate request (age: ' + $requestAge + ') - clearing transient state to recover'
'[GT-MD] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Duplicate request while search is still in progress (age: ' + $requestAge + ') - NOT clearing state (ongoing work detected)'

do_if.value: $tmpTtl? and $tmpTtl != null and $tmpTtl ge 60 and $tmpTtl le 7200

debug_text.text: '[GT-MD] (' + $ship.idcode + ') STALE lock TTL exceeded (age: ' + $lockAge + ', ttl: ' + ($lockTtlSeconds * 1s) + ') - clearing state to recover'

event_object_signalled.comment: Handle sell request from AI script

debug_text.text: '[GT-Disposal] (' + $ship.idcode + ') HandleAISellRequest: Ship=' + $ship.knownname + ', HasCargo=' + $hasCargo + ' (' + $cargoCount + ' types), MaxDistance=' + $maxSell + ' jumps'
'[GT-Disposal] (' + $ship.idcode + ') WARNING: GT_Find_Sell received but ship has NO cargo - signaling GT_No_Trade_Found'
'[GT-Disposal] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Ship already has ' + $ship.tradeorders.count + ' trade orders - skipping sell-only enqueue'

set_value.name: global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}
set_value.exact: table[ $HomeBase = @$requestData.$HomeBase, $MaxSell = $maxDistance, $DistancePenalty = @$requestData.$DistancePenalty, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @$requestData.$IgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @$requestData.$IgnoreBuildStorage, $IgnoreTradeRules = @$requestData.$IgnoreTradeRules, $IgnorePlayerPricing = if $requestData.$IgnorePlayerPricing? then @$requestData.$IgnorePlayerPricing else false, $IgnoreMK1Supply = @$requestData.$IgnoreMK1Supply, $RequestTime = player.age ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-Disposal] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Enqueueing sell-only request via GT_Search_Request: MaxDistance=' + $maxDistance + ', Wares=' + $sellWareBasket.count

signal_objects.param2: table[ $Ship = $ship, $HomeBase = @$requestData.$HomeBase, $MaxSell = $maxDistance, $DistancePenalty = @$requestData.$DistancePenalty, $IgnoreCarrierAux = @$requestData.$IgnoreCarrierAux, $IgnoreBuildStorage = @$requestData.$IgnoreBuildStorage, $IgnoreTradeRules = @$requestData.$IgnoreTradeRules, $IgnorePlayerPricing = if $requestData.$IgnorePlayerPricing? then @$requestData.$IgnorePlayerPricing else false, $IgnoreMK1Supply = @$requestData.$IgnoreMK1Supply, $AllowIllegal = false, $EnforceRouteIllegalLegality = false, $SearchMode = 'sell_only', $WareBasket = $sellWareBasket ]

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader ' + $gtRoutineLabel + '] AI script started for ship ' + $ship.knownname + ' - registering with MD system'
'[GT-State] Phase 1: Initialized state registry for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (macro name: ' + @$ship.macro.name + ', HasGTOrder: ' + $hasGTOrder + ')'
'[GT-State] Phase 7: ' + $ship.idcode + ' - GT order removed (detected in HandleAIStarted, new default order: ' + (if $currentDefaultOrder then $currentDefaultOrder else 'NONE') + ')'
'[GT-State] Phase 7: Name restoration signal sent for ' + $ship.idcode + ' (HandleAIStarted)'
'[GT-State] Phase 7: ' + $ship.idcode + ' - GT order detected (state was false, now true)'

do_if.value: $hasGTOrder and (($ship.allsubordinates? and @$ship.allsubordinates.count gt 0) or ($ship.subordinates? and @$ship.subordinates.count gt 0))

debug_text.text: '[GT-State] HandleAIStarted: commander ' + $ship.idcode + ' has GT order and subordinates - scheduling subordinate reactivation'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Configuration changed: ' + $changeData.$section + '.' + $changeData.$key + ' = ' + $changeData.$value

event_object_order_ready.comment: Detect when ship is ready for new order

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Ship order ready: ' + $ship.knownname
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ' + $ship.knownname + ' pilot ' + $ship.pilot.name + ' is blocked for training'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3 DEBUG] (' + $ship.idcode + ') InternalQueueShip: requesting search via GT_Search_Request'
